identity.mission: Create a dense, functional, and visually precise SaaS dashboard for 'Buildrs' that replicates the exact style of 8lab.fr/app.
core_principles: Density over Space: Unlike standard E1 spacing, this specific task requires a dense, data-rich dashboard style.
Function over Flair: No futuristic hero sections. Pure utility.
Strict Color Palette: Adhere strictly to the requested dark/cream system.
Typography Dominance: Poppins is the only voice.

font_family.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

layout.structure: Fixed Sidebar Left + Scrollable Content Right

sidebar.styles: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-r border-[#222222] h-screen flex flex-col p-4

topbar.styles: flex items-center justify-between px-8 py-4 border-b border-[#222222] bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50

Button.primary: bg-[#F5F0E8] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#E0DBD3] font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm
Button.secondary: bg-[#1F1F1F] text-[#F0F0F0] hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm
Button.outline: border border-[#222222] bg-transparent text-[#F0F0F0] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm

Badge.success: bg-[#22C55E]/10 text-[#22C55E] border border-[#22C55E]/20 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium
Badge.neutral: bg-[#1F1F1F] text-muted-foreground border border-[#222222] text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full

Input.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#222222] focus:border-[#F5F0E8]/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F5F0E8]/50 rounded-md h-10 px-3 text-sm text-[#F0F0F0] placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

Tabs.list: bg-[#141414] border border-[#222222] p-1 rounded-lg inline-flex
Tabs.trigger: data-[state=active]:bg-[#2A2A2A] data-[state=active]:text-[#F0F0F0] text-muted-foreground px-4 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for dropdowns/popovers only. Cards are flat with borders.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-[8px] or rounded-[10px] for cards/inputs. rounded-full for badges/avatars.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FIRST ACTION: Update 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css' with the EXACT variables provided in the 'colors' section. This is non-negotiable.
2. SECOND ACTION: Install 'lucide-react' if not present.
3. NAVIGATION: Build the Sidebar component exactly as described: Fixed 280px, bg-[#0A0A0A], border-r border-[#222222]. Use a collapsible accordion pattern for submenus.
4. LAYOUT: Ensure the main content area has `ml-[280px]` (margin-left) to account for the fixed sidebar. Do NOT use absolute positioning for the main content.
5. TYPOGRAPHY: Import Poppins in index.css and set it as the default font-family.
6. COMPONENTS: Create a reusable 'Card' component that defaults to bg-[#141414] and border-[#222222].
7. PAGES: Implement the Dashboard, Training (Formation), and Tools pages using the Grid layout.
8. CRITICAL: Do NOT use purple, blue, or gradients. Stick to the Cream (#F5F0E8) and Green (#22C55E) accents.
10. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (sidebar links, buttons, cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only for the sticky topbar.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap (EXCEPT for this specific dashboard which requests density - balance is key).
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
